name: stockyard-stockyard
description: All 125 Stockyard products in one binary. Cost control, caching, validation, routing, security, analytics, and more.

tools.name: stockyard_status
tools.description: Get full suite status: all enabled features, health, and summary stats.

tools.name: stockyard_spend
tools.description: Get current LLM spending across all projects.

tools.name: stockyard_cache_stats
tools.description: Get cache hit/miss statistics and savings.

tools.name: stockyard_providers
tools.description: Get health and routing status of all providers.

tools.name: stockyard_analytics
tools.description: Get analytics overview: latency, error rates, costs, volume.

tools.name: stockyard_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the Stockyard suite is running and healthy.
